data.title: 220 million BGB have been destroyed, and another 220 million BGB have been transferred to a new wallet for locking
data.description: According to Lookonchain, 220 million BGB (valued at $1.09 billion) have been destroyed, and another 220 million BGB (valued at $1.09 billion) have been transferred to a new wallet for lockup. Previously, Bitget and Morph announced an exclusive strategic partnership. Morph will adopt BGB as its gas and governance token. The Morph Foundation will update the BGB destruction mechanism, tying it to Morph network activity, until the total BGB supply reaches 100 million.

data.title: Binance: GATA token airdrop currently experiencing delays
data.description: Binance announced that the Gata (GATA) token airdrop is currently experiencing delays. Please wait for further official announcements regarding the exact redemption time. Previously, users holding at least 220 Binance Alpha Points were eligible to claim 500 GATA tokens on a first-come, first-served basis. The minimum score will automatically decrease by 15 points every hour for the duration of the event.

data.title: Justin Sun: The group earns billions of dollars a year, and 100% of the interest on WLFI's high-interest wealth management products comes from group subsidies.
data.description: Justin Sun responded to questions about the high-interest investment products offered by users' WLFI deposits. He stated, "Some people online have questioned Huobi's high-interest investment products. I would like to clarify a few points: 1. Much like the current trend of instant retail (free meals), the interest on these high-interest investment products comes 100% from group subsidies. Essentially, this is a bid for users to compete with other trading platforms. Everyone can deposit and spend freely, and the subsidy logic is simple: more users, more transactions, and long-term profitability. 2. Huobi is still in its early stages of growth, and our strategy is to ensure everyone deposits with confidence, with unlimited deposits and no upper limit. Once funds have accumulated, we can discuss other matters. 3. We've been working on Merkle tree proofs for almost 34 months now, so I'm sure there will still be accusations of financial opacity. 4. With the group now earning billions of dollars a year, I'm sure no one will question our ability to afford these subsidies."

data.title: Hackers use Ethereum smart contracts to conceal malware in code libraries: report
data.description:

data.title: Chainlink’s treasury reserve jumps 300%: is LINK price set to explode?
data.description:
Chainlink price is trading around $23 after paring gains from highs of $28 this past month. However, recently launched Chainlink Reserve has grown by 300% in 30 days. Could LINK price follow this traction? Strategic treasury moves have helped Ethereum hit a new peak, and other coins are also bullish on this trend
source: https://coinjournal.net/news/chainlinks-treasury-reserve-jumps-300-is-link-price-set-to-explode/

data.title: Binance CEO Richard Teng to Visit South Korea Amid Regulatory Push
data.description:
Binance CEO Richard Teng is set to visit South Korea next week as the country steps up efforts to formalize its digital asset regulatory framework.
source: https://cryptonews.com/news/binance-ceo-richard-teng-to-visit-south-korea-amid-regulatory-push/

data.title: Ukraine Parliament Passes First Reading of Crypto Legalization Bill with 23% Tax Rate
data.description:
Ukraine's parliament passed first reading of crypto legalization bill with 246 votes establishing 23% combined tax rate on virtual asset profits while addressing critical regulatory gaps that have enabled billions in illicit flows, with legislation proposing 18% personal income tax plus 5% military levy on crypto gains.
source: https://cryptonews.com/news/ukraine-parliament-passes-first-reading-of-crypto-legalization-bill-with-23-tax-rate/

data.title: A certain address has accumulated 191,000 AAVE tokens worth $61.03 million from multiple CEXs over the past three weeks.
data.description: According to on-chain analyst Ember, a certain address has accumulated 191,000 AAVE tokens, worth $61.03 million, across various CEX exchanges over the past three weeks. In the past four days alone, this address has withdrawn 128,905 AAVE tokens, worth $40.83 million, from CEXs like Binance and OKX.

data.title: Ethereum validator queues face 14-day delays with over 1.6M ETH pending
data.description:
4-9-2025 – Data from ValidatorQueue reveals significant congestion in Ethereum’s Proof-of-Stake (PoS) network, with 825,453 ETH in the exit queue and 833,609 ETH in the entry queue, causing delays of over 14 days for both processes. The exit queue, reflecting validators seeking to withdraw staked ETH, faces a wait of approximately 14 days and 8 [. .
source: https://www.cointrackdaily.com/ethereum-validator-queues-face-14-day-delays-with-over-1-6m-eth-pending/

data.title: DeepSeek Develops Advanced AI Model to Compete with Industry Leaders
data.description: According to PANews, sources reveal that DeepSeek is working on an advanced artificial intelligence model designed to compete with industry giants like OpenAI. The company is reportedly developing an AI system capable of executing multi-step operations with minimal user input. Additionally, the system aims to learn and improve based on previous actions. DeepSeek's founder is urging the team to launch this new software in the final quarter of this year.

data.title: USD.AI to increase deposit limit to $160 million
data.description: Stablecoin protocol USD.AI announced that it will increase its deposit limit from $110 million to $160 million at 8 PM tonight. Furthermore, the next deposit limit increase will coincide with the launch of the Plasma mainnet.

data.title: Hackers exploit Ethereum smart contracts to deliver malware evading detection
data.description:
4-9-2025 – Cybersecurity researchers at ReversingLabs have uncovered a novel malware delivery method using Ethereum smart contracts to conceal malicious commands, bypassing traditional security scans. The discovery, detailed in a Wednesday blog post by researcher Lucija Valentić, involves two malicious packages, “colortoolsv2” and “mimelib2,” published on the Node Package Manager (NPM) repository in July. These [.
source: https://www.cointrackdaily.com/hackers-exploit-ethereum-smart-contracts-to-deliver-malware-evading-detection/

data.title: Binance Alpha GATA Airdrop Delayed
data.description: Binance announced on X that the Binance Alpha Gata (GATA) airdrop will be delayed, and the official announcement on the specific time that eligible users can receive the airdrop will soon be made.

data.title: Binance Square Launches PYTH Token Reward Campaign on CreatorPad
data.description:
According to the announcement from Binance, a new campaign on CreatorPad is set to offer 617,330 PYTH token voucher rewards to verified users who complete specific tasks. CreatorPad, a platform on Binance Square, allows users to earn token rewards by engaging in various activities. The campaign runs from 2025-09-04 10:00 (UTC) to 2025-10-04 10:00 (UTC).

The campaign introduces a Mindshare Leaderboard, launched on 2025-07-17, which evaluates users based on the quality and relevance of their content. Users who produce thoughtful and consistent posts will achieve higher rankings. To participate, verified Binance users must complete three tasks to qualify for a share of the 617,330 PYTH reward pool. The tasks include creating content related to the Pyth Network, following the project's account on Binance Square and X, and completing trading tasks involving PYTH.

The reward structure is based on the leaderboard results at the campaign's end. The top 100 creators on the Pyth Network 30-Day Project Leaderboard will share 432,131 PYTH, while the remaining eligible participants will share 185,199 PYTH equally. Users must maintain their campaign-related posts for at least 60 days after the campaign ends to remain eligible for rewards. Binance emphasizes that only verified accounts can participate, and any violation of community guidelines will result in disqualification. Voucher rewards will be distributed within 14 working days after the campaign concludes, with a validity period of seven days from distribution. Binance retains the right to amend the terms and conditions of the campaign at its discretion.
